prestazioni: Upgrade the **CA4GC20TD-30** 3.0L twin-turbo V6 (450hp stock) with a **Garrett GTX4274R** turbocharger (800hp target) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve** for optimized boost response and spool characteristics.

Replace the OEM **ZF 8HP75** 8-speed transmission with a **Porsche 911 GT3 RS PDK** (9-speed) conversion kit from **RUF Automobile**, including a **Puegeot Racing clutch** and **South Bend Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** for 900Nm torque capacity.

Install a **Motec M150 ECU** with **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to support E85 flex-fuel tuning, paired with a **Forge Motorsport intercooler** (50% larger core) and **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** for sustained power delivery.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (HS9-specific) with **custom carbon fiber fenders** (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** for aggressive stance, paired with **HRE FF01** 23-inch forged wheels (9.5J front, 11J rear) in **Gunmetal Bronze**.

Replace the OEM grille with a **custom 3D-printed titanium mesh grille** (laser-sintered) and **Lumma Design CLR-HS9 front bumper** with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber splitter** and **Vorsteiner-style side skirts** for aerodynamic balance.

Install a **Novitec Torado-style rear diffuser** (carbon fiber) with **active aero flaps** (controlled via **Motec ADL3 dash logger**) and **Oracle Lighting RGB LED underglow** (addressable, syncs with **Apple CarPlay/Android Auto** for dynamic color shifts).
